convention.case: lowercase folders + filenames; case-sensitive servers will fail otherwise

formats.photos: JPG q82 progressive, max 1600px on long edge

usage: header logo via shared.jsx Logo component
logo.notes: Keep PNG for transparency; only ~84KB so no need to convert.

hero.video.notes: Vertical 9:16 source; cropped via object-fit on render. Mobile uses poster-only to save data.

hero.poster.alt: Pink and gold balloon arch with neon Happy Birthday sign
usage: hero.jsx — mobile background, video poster fallback

gallery.balloon-arch-pink-silver.alt: Pink and silver balloon arch with neon Happy Birthday sign and disco wall

gallery.backdrop-sage-its-a-boy.alt: Sage green and cream balloon backdrop with an It's a Boy cart

gallery.babyshower-oh-baby.alt: Cream and sage Oh Baby! baby shower with neon arch and pampas florals
usage: CategoryGrid → Florals tile (placeholder until a dedicated florals shot ships)

gallery.gender-reveal-boy-or-girl.alt: Boy or Girl gender reveal setup with pampas, balloons and bulldog ring bearer

gallery.milestone-50-pastel.alt: Pastel pink and lavender 50th birthday balloon arch with marquee numbers

press.tv-good-things-utah.alt: Miss Utah Decor team featured on the Good Things Utah TV set

open_slots.ideal_shot: tight crop of fresh/faux floral arrangement (no balloons dominating)
small at-home party kit / pre-built bouquet of balloons in a box
